title: Our Team | Psychology Direct
description: Meet the dedicated client managers and leadership team supporting your cases and assessments.

blocks.headline: Meet the People Who'll Handle Your Case
blocks.subtitle: Your Client Manager comes from legal, education, or psychology. They understand your world. They advocate for you.

team.name: Aaron Banham
team.bio: Built Psychology Direct over 15+ years. Drives quality, professionalism, and people-first values. Passionate about connecting experts with the cases that matter most.

team.name: Denise Leander
team.bio: Oversees quality, performance, and team development. Ensures every case meets our standards. Supports every team member.

team.name: Daisy Hill
team.bio: Legal sector specialist. Knows CPR, Legal Aid, and court timelines. Manages expert matching for solicitors and courts.

team.name: Katie Séverin
team.bio: Educational Psychology specialist. Knows EHCP, SEND, and statutory assessment timelines. Matches experts for local authorities and schools.

team.name: Emily Creaven
team.bio: Solicitor-facing specialist. Manages complex legal cases with precision and professionalism. Your point of contact for fast, efficient service.

team.name: Sinead McCaffrey
team.bio: Expert in multi-party case coordination. Brings logistics expertise and calm problem-solving to every case.

team.name: Chloe Beaumont
team.bio: Global mindset with cultural sensitivity. Matches experts with specific language or cultural requirements.

team.name: Lauren Blackett
team.bio: Education and organisation specialist. Manages school and local authority relationships with warmth and efficiency.

blocks.heading: Meet the Teams
blocks.subheading: Organised by sector, united by one mission: support you.

cards.title: Expert Witness Team
cards.description: Specialists in family law, criminal, civil, and immigration cases. They understand court deadlines and what solicitors need to win. You get a dedicated manager from day one.

cards.title: Education Team
cards.description: Experts in EHCP assessments, SEND support, and statutory evaluations. They match Educational Psychologists who understand what you need.

cards.title: Support & Administration
cards.description: The backbone of our service. They manage appointments, coordination, and case logistics. You focus on your case.

blocks.heading: Looking to Join Our Team?
blocks.bodyText: We're hiring Client Managers, coordinators, and support professionals. Flexible work. Supportive culture. Real difference. Apply if you're passionate about serving both experts and clients.

blocks.heading: Ready to Work With Our Team?
blocks.bodyText: Your Client Manager is a call away. We answer questions, match you with experts, and handle the rest.
